notes: Netlink products: TurboFRAD, OmniFRAD, NetFRAD; superseded by routers and MPLS
Packet-switched WAN protocol; began displacing leased lines 1991; peaked ~2000; displaced by MPLS
Legacy IBM mainframe networking protocol; 9 bytes overhead with RFC 1490 vs 50-70 for TCP/IP encapsulation
